title: The 1,000 Eyes of Dr. Mabuse
writer: Fritz Lang, Heinz Oskar Wuttig, Jan Fethke
actors: Dawn Addams, Peter van Eyck, Gert Fröbe
plot: In 1960s Germany, criminal mastermind Dr. Mabuse uses hypnotized victims and the surveillance equipment of a Nazi-era bugged hotel to steal nuclear technology from a visiting American industrialist.
